-(%0A%09%22bufio%22%0A%09%22fmt%22%0A%09%22os%22%0A%09%22strings%22%0A)%0A%0Afunc getPrecedence(op string) int %7B%0A%09switch op %7B%0A%09case %22+%22, %22-%22:%0A%09%09return 1%0A%09case %22*%22, %22/%22:%0A%09%09return 2%0A%09case %22%5E%22:%0A%09%09return 3%0A%09%7D%0A%09return 0%0A%7D%0A%0Afunc main() %7B%0A%09scanner := bufio.NewScanner(os.Stdin)%0A%0A%09if !scanner.Scan() %7B%0A%09%09return%0A%09%7D%0A%09line := scanner.Text()%0A%09tokens := strings.Fields(line)%0A%0A%09var output %5B%5Dstring%0A%09var operator %5B%5Dstring%0A%0A%09for _, token := range tokens %7B%0A%09%09prec := getPrecedence(token)%0A%0A%09%09if prec %3E 0 %7B%0A%09%09%09for len(operator) %3E 0 %7B%0A%09%09%09%09topOperator := operator%5Blen(operator)-1%5D%0A%09%09%09%09if getPrecedence(topOperator) %3E= prec %7B%0A%09%09%09%09%09output = append(output, topOperator)%0A%09%09%09%09%09operator = operator%5B:len(operator)-1%5D%0A%09%09%09%09%7D else %7B%0A%09%09%09%09%09break%0A%09%09%09%09%7D%0A%09%09%09%7D%0A%09%09%09operator = append(operator, token)%0A%0A%09%09%7D else %7B%0A%09%09%09output = append(output, token)%0A%09%09%7D%0A%09%7D%0A%09for i := len(operator) - 1; i %3E= 0; i-- %7B%0A%09%09output = append(output, operator%5Bi%5D)%0A%09%7D%0A%0A%09fmt.Println(strings.Join(output, %22 %22))%0A
